nasb.text: For I know your transgressions are many and your sins are great, You who distress the righteous and accept bribes And turn aside the poor in the gate.

esv.text: For I know how many are your transgressions and how great are your sins— you who afflict the righteous, who take a bribe, and turn aside the needy in the gate.

cnv.text: 因為我知道你們的過犯眾多，罪大惡極； 你們迫害義人，收受賄賂， 在城門口屈枉窮乏人；

ccb.text: 我知道你们的过犯众多、罪恶无数。 你们迫害义人，收受贿赂， 在城门口冤枉穷人。
